title: Anikulapo (2022) - directed by Kunle Afolayan
description: An epic Yoruba folktale film. A weaver named Saro travels in search of greener pastures and ends up in the Oyo Kingdom where he encounters the mythical Akala bird. Themes: love, ambition, betrayal, mortality. Cast: Kunle Remi, Bimbo Ademoye, Sola Sobowale.
